content:
<!-- type: logic lang: mermaid -->

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph load_config["load_config: Config Source Priority"]
        A[load_config root] --> B{jet-workspace.yaml\nexists?}
        B -->|yes| C[Parse YAML\nReturn WorkspaceConfig]
        B -->|no| D{package.json\nworkspaces field?}
        D -->|yes, non-empty| E[Extract packages array\nReturn WorkspaceConfig]
        D -->|no / empty| F{pnpm-workspace.yaml\nexists?}
        F -->|yes| G[Parse pnpm-workspace.yaml]
        G --> H[packages: → config.packages]
        G --> I[catalog: → config.catalog]
        G --> J["catalogs: → flatten into config.catalog\nkey = 'catalog_name:dep_name'"]
        H & I & J --> K[Return Some WorkspaceConfig]
        F -->|no| L[Return None\nsingle project]
    end

    subgraph install["install_with_options: Dep Classification"]
        M[install_with_options pkg_dir] --> N{WorkspaceMode::detect?}
        N -->|Single| O[Standard registry resolve + install]
        N -->|Jet| P[recursive_workspace_install]
        P --> Q[topological_order → ordered pkgs]
        Q --> R{dep spec?}
        R -->|"starts with workspace:"| S[resolve_workspace_protocol\nget_package → abs_path]
        S --> T["compute relative path\nnode_modules/name → ../../pkg"]
        T --> U[create relative symlink\nno download]
        U --> V["LockfileEntry\nworkspace=true, local_path, version"]
        R -->|semver range| W[Registry resolve\ndownload + extract to store]
        W --> X[hardlink into node_modules]
        X --> Y["LockfileEntry\nworkspace=false"]
    end

    subgraph valid["Lockfile::is_valid: Workspace Bypass"]
        Z[is_valid lockfile] --> AA{entry.workspace?}
        AA -->|true| BB[skip store.has_package\nreturn true]
        AA -->|false| CC[store.has_package\ncheck integrity]
    end
```
